title: ACTREC Recruitment 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for Physician Assistant Posts
description: The Advanced Centre for Treatment, Research and Education in Cancer (ACTREC) has officially announced a Walk-in Interview for the recruitment of Physician Assistant Posts. Those candidates who have qualified in the MBBS, BAMS, BUMS, and BDS can grab this chance and apply for the ACTREC Recruitment 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. If you are looking for more, here is a list of Gover...
